design_philosophy.description: A rugged, field-ready aesthetic that merges military-grade legibility with organic textures. Design for the rancher standing in bright sunlight with dirty hands. Big touch targets, high contrast text, and zero fluff.
rules: No gradients that reduce contrast. Solid, flat colors only.
Touch targets must be minimum 48x48px (E1 Rule: Go for 56px).
Text must be pure White (#FFFFFF) on dark backgrounds, or pure Black (#000000) on light. No subtle greys for essential data.
Use 'Cardless' lists where possible to save screen real estate, or high-contrast bordered cards.

technical_setup.fonts: System Fonts (San Francisco / Roboto) to ensure zero-latency rendering

primary.description: Forest Green - The color of healthy pasture.

secondary.description: Burnt Orange - High visibility accent for alerts and floating actions.

background.description: Deep Loam (Dark) or Bone White (Light). Default to Dark for battery/glare balance in some contexts, but support Light for direct sun.

layout_strategies.card_style: bg-surface border border-border p-4 rounded-xl shadow-sm
layout_strategies.bottom_nav: absolute bottom-0 w-full bg-surface border-t border-border h-20 flex-row justify-around items-center pb-4

Button.base: h-14 rounded-lg flex-row items-center justify-center active:opacity-90

Input.base: bg-surface border border-border h-14 rounded-lg px-4 text-white placeholder:text-muted-foreground

auth.name: Login con Google
auth.layout: Hero Image Top (40%) + Login Action Bottom (60%)
auth.notes: Simple, one-tap login. No complex forms.

map_view.name: Gestión de Potreros
map_view.interactions: Tap polygon to see pasture details

hero_cattle.alt: Brown cow and calf in grassy field

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'nativewind' and 'tailwindcss' immediately. Generate the 'tailwind.config.js' manually if needed.
2. LANGUAGE: All UI labels must be in Spanish (e.g., 'Guardar', 'Cancelar', 'Nuevo Animal').
3. NAVIGATION: Use 'expo-router' with a Bottom Tab layout.
4. MAPS: Implementation of OpenStreetMap in React Native requires using '<UrlTile urlTemplate="https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png" />' inside '<MapView>'.
5. DATA-TESTID: Every interactive element must have a 'testID' prop (React Native equivalent of data-testid). Format: 'screen-element-action' (e.g., 'login-button-press').
6. THEME: Implement the 'High Contrast Earth' theme. Do not use low-contrast greys.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'KeyboardAvoidingView' issues by testing form inputs.
Use 'ScrollView' with 'contentContainerStyle={{ flexGrow: 1 }}' for scrollable forms.
For icons, import from 'lucide-react-native' and style with NativeWind classes (e.g., 'text-primary').
